data.title: Booking Holdings Q4 Earnings: Revenue Beat, EPS Beat, Dividend Increase, Shares Move Higher
data.description: Booking Holdings reported fourth-quarter revenue of $5.47 billion, beating analyst estimates of $5.18 billion. The online travel agency company reported fourth-quarter adjusted earnings of $41.55 per share, beating analyst estimates of $35.89 per share, according to Benzinga Pro.

data.title: FTAI Aviation Shares Surge After Resolving Short Seller Allegations
data.description: FTAI Aviation shares are trading higher Thursday following a major announcement that addressed recent short seller reports.

data.title: Xos Shares Surge After Securing US Government Procurement Listing
data.description: Shares of Xos, Inc. (NASDAQ: XOS) are surging after after the company announced that its Xos Hub had been officially listed on the General Services Administration (GSA) Schedule.

data.title: Telomir Pharmaceuticals Seeks To Tap Multi-Billion-Dollar Market With Breakthrough In Silver Ion Stabilization For Antibacterial Treatment, Tissue Regeneration
data.description: Telomir Pharmaceuticals' Telomir-1 stabilizes Silver(II) for medical use, addressing instability issues in antimicrobial treatments and wound care solutions.

data.title: Nvidia Takes On Scalpers By Offering RTX 5090, 5080 Founders Edition GPUs To Loyal Users
data.description: Nvidia is fighting off scalpers with a unique way to check for loyal users when selling off its newest GPUs.
